body_text:
20:45 â November 12, 2020
Wires Part Update
We updated the Wires Part to reflect enhancements made to the Wires application. New filters were added to the Submitted Wires page and the Received Wires page. Additionally, a new Member Number field was added to the Sender section on the Pending Outgoing Wires â Personal Information page and Submitted Wires â Personal Information page.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires
Section 1.3, Wires Document Library
We added the following new forms:
IBAN Country List Form, 9252
United Arab Emirates â Purpose of Payment Codes, 9254.
Section 2.1, Definitions
Added definitions for 2-Step security.
Chapter 5, Wires Access and Administration
We removed biometric references.
Section 10.5, Filtering and Exporting the Submitted or Received Wires Lists
We updated the available filters on the Submitted Wires page and the Received Wires page.
The following new filters were added to the Submitted Wires page:
Cross-Border
Amount Range From and Amount to
Currency
The following new filters were added to the Received wires page: Cross-Border:
Amount From and Amount To
Currency
Original Amount From and Original Amount To
Original Currency
Section 12.2 Approving Outgoing Wires
We added procedures for accessing the Pending Outgoing Wires â Personal Information page via the âView Personal Informationâ button. A Member Number field was added to the Sender section on the Pending Outgoing Wires â Personal Information page.
Note: The Member Number field is also available on the Submitted Wires â Personal Information page.
Section 13.1, Cancelling and Recalling Outgoing Wires
We added examples of why a wire may be returned or recalled and information on how FX rates are applied to returned or recalled wires.
